name: School Chale Hum
overview: It's true that the school days are the best days and one can never replace those memories ever again. You live your school life only once and never understand its importance once you are in your adult life. So to relive those days, Alright brings you its new series School Chale Hum, well because school life sabse special hoti hai!

trailers.title: Alright! | School Chale Hum | Official Trailer | Ft. Mugdha, Abhishek & Ranjan
